rulings.Case Title: COSTANZO BUZZELLI et al VS. MARY DEBENEDETTI, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE MARY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 128.7
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 12, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFFs COSTANZO BUZZELLI, NANCY HAYDEN, NICHOLAS PAPAGEORGE, QUYNH PHAN, PAUL TAFT, MARIKO TAKEL, ARISTOTLE SMITH and CAROL URBAN's Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 128.7 DENIED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CYRUS LAFARRE VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 12, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to negligence cause of action and violation of B&P 17200; Demurrer is otherwise sustained to allege all elements of each cause of action, including factual allegations re: submission of a complete modification application and fraud with requisite particularity. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLENE FINLEY VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 12, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to June 12, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than May 22, 2105 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLENE FINLEY VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant San Francisco Housing Authoritys Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Claim For Punitive Damages
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 12, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Claim For Punitive Damages Continued to June 12, 2015. rulings.Case Title: ALEXIOS DIMITRIOU VS. ANDREW DIMITRIOU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 12, 2015, line 12. DEFENDANT ANDREW DIMITRIOU's Motion To Vacate Default GRANTED, default is set aside. Defendant shall file answer no later that May 12, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. Robert Smith is sanctioned in the amount to $750 payable to Plaintiff's counsel within 30 days of this order. Defendant prepare and present to the Court proposed order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHAO LAN LUK ET AL VS. JENNIFER RUN PING LU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 12, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANTs JENNIFER LU, JING YU, CARMEN YU and COLLEEN YU's Motion For Sanctions DENIED. Plaintiff's complaint does not violate CCCP 128.7(b)(1) or (b)(3). = (501/REQ)
